title: Rainbow Lucky Block
description: A OP Rainbow Lucky Block With Custom Items
body:
> **The Rainbow Lucky Block mod Adds:**
> 
> - A new Rainbow Toolset
> - New Rainbow Armor
> - Rainbow Greatsword
> - Rainbow Scythe
> - A Rainbow Lucky Block
> - A Rainbow Apple
> 
> **How to get started:** You can craft a Rainbw Lucky Block with an emerald, an iron ingot, a diamond, gold ingot and a chest (Full Recipe in Gallery) Or You can find it rarely generating in caves!
> 
> **How to get the custom items:** To get all the mods new Items you have to break The Rainbow Lucky Block and it drops vanilla or new Custom Items!
>
> **Credits:**
> - If you use this mod in a modpack please Credit me!
>
